title: Bridge Essay: Silence in Shamatha, Transcendental, and Stillness Meditation: An Evidence Synth

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Silence, in, Shamatha,, Transcendental,, and.

**Silence in Shamatha, Transcendental, and Stillness Meditation: An Evidence Synthesis Based on Expert Texts.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 32733305. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2020.01259. Shamatha, Transcendental, and Stillness Meditation are said to aim for "contentless" experiences, where mental content such as thoughts, perceptions, and mental images is absent. Silence is understood to be acentral feature of those experiences. The main source of information about the experiences is texts by experts from within the three traditions.
